creator: astrelkov@ripn.net
text:
Hi!
I have situation like this on Dell R410 and Dell R510 servers.

Configure a Dell R410 or R510 with FreeBSD 7.3 for serial console using the Handbook instructions.
Reboot the server.
Log in using the serial console.
Log out.
The serial console will stop responding.
But if you try to login "in blind", you will. You could see your login on server, but console will be "blind".
After resetting getty on ttyd0 by HUP you could login only once. After that situation repeats.

This patch repair situation.

-- 
?????? ????? Alexey Strelkov

Autonomous Nonprofit Organization
"Regional Network Information Center" (RU-CENTER)
